title: Tongue
teaser: Already a full arrangement on the page — B minor, ~112 BPM, a key-change bridge. The most finished, most anthemic.
lyric:
Tongue

Verse 1

Why do you explain yourself to people who won’t listen

They prefer confirmation of the prejudices in their minds

The moment you start trying is the moment you have failed

Maybe I should shut the fuck up and cut out my tongue. 

Chorus

Take some time (over and over)

To free your mind (above and beyond)

My tongue was kind (always and forever)

But my tongue has died (I speak no more)

Post chorus 

There is only one thing that everyone should know:

It’s impossible to be understood

If your words reveal the ugly truth

There is nothing more to do

For people who deal in absolutes

Interlude

Chorus

Endless time (forever and forever)

Empty mind (oh yeah, that’s it)

Ignorance is bliss (I’m smiling inside)

This is an ironic twist (wait, what do you mean?)

Lead up to key change

Bridge

If you think you’ve found your secret

Please leave me the fuck alone

I promise I’ll stay silent

And let things go

One day you might find yourself

In a position such as mine

Cut out your tongue and hope to die

title: I love the world
teaser: G major · 3/4 · ~68 BPM — one voice, one guitar, the swerve sung dead straight, ending on silence. The one to record first.
lyric:
I love the world

Oh,  I love the world.

with its splendid wonder

and that we can discover, for always long

Oh, I love the world

with its creeks and trees

and endless

suffering

Oh, I love the world

with its roads and cars

and an untimely

terrible demise

title: Ssh dis laat in die aand
teaser: A late-night talking-blues in D minor — Marcus Aurelius meets a missing charger. The richest and the hardest.
lyric:
Ssh dis laat in die aand

Van my gunsteling tye is Wanneer my vrou en kinders

heerlik veilig slaap maar

dan en wan is ek nog wakker

ssh dis laat in die aand

Ek geniet dié tyd alleen soos wat

die Pater Patriae, die filosoof-keiser

Marcus Aurelius dit geniet het in sy

twee middernagtelike ure nadat hy gesorg het vir

Nommer 1. Sy familie

Nommer 2. Die Romeinse Ryk

Nommer 3. En homself ook

ssh dis laat in die aand

In dié tyd het hy geskryf en ons

lees nog sy dagboek derduisende jare later

en dit bring soveel wysheid,

hy’s ’n mens in ’n biljoen en hy verdien respek.

ssh dis laat in die aandNou laat julle mooi vertel

Ek volg die voorbeeld van Marcus

Ek maak tyd vir myself, maar

eerste kom my familie

my klein rykdom van liefde

ssh dis laat in die aand

En later wanneer die tyd reg is

dan wil ek graag gaan slaap, maar

god weet daar’s altyd ’n donnerse twist

En dan moet Lorrels weer net gou ietsie fix:

Nommer 1 - my rekenaar kan nie slaap nie, daar’s ’n bug

Nommer 2 - my charger is nie waar hy was nie, dit was geskuif

Nommer 3 - ek soek my boek maar ek lees so baie ek weet nie watter een nie

Oh, anguished soul, Laurie

He can’t even find proper rest

It’s all bullshit, let me tell you

Just remove all the obstacles and sleep, for heaven’s sake!  Maar onthou wie ek is wat ek nou vertel

Ek is ’n goeddekende mens, 100% rasioneel

En niemand gaan vir my sê “gaan slaap nie”

Dit het nie gewerk as kind nie, en dit gaan ook nie nou nie

title: Aan al die dose met hul diagnoses
teaser: Thirty seconds of drop-D hardcore — restrained, then detonating. Fokofpolisiekar lineage.
lyric:
Aan al die dose met hul diagnoses

Aan al die dose met hule diagnoses

WIL ONS NET SE - FOKOF FOKOF NA JULLE EIE HUIS TOE

POESE!!!
